originatingBug: P2 state mutation analysis only applies when a function has 2 or more contracts

declarations: (declare-const fn_contracts_count Int) (declare-const p2_checks_generated Bool) (assert (and p2_checks_generated (< fn_contracts_count 2)))
smt.assertion: (declare-const fn_contracts_count Int) (declare-const p2_checks_generated Bool) (assert (and p2_checks_generated (< fn_contracts_count 2)))
